name: X Simulator Drone
short_description: Experience stunning drone realism with two difficulty levels. Fly two advanced drones across beautiful maps. Switch perspectives, including a controllable drone camera, for the ultimate piloting challenge.
detailed_description: Dive into the ultimate drone simulation experience with our state-of-the-art game built on Unreal Engine 5. Choose between two advanced drones, each offering a unique level of difficulty—one designed for easy handling and the other for a more challenging flight. Explore meticulously crafted maps with breathtaking visuals and switch between different perspectives, including a fully controllable drone camera for an authentic first-person view. Perfect for both novice and experienced pilots, our next-gen simulator provides an unmatched level of detail and immersion. Master your piloting skills and see the world from a whole new perspective.
about_the_game: Dive into the ultimate drone simulation experience with our state-of-the-art game built on Unreal Engine 5. supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Korean, Russian, Turkish, Ukrainian, Japanese
